sub_modules.dct8_coeff_rom: Combinational Q2.14 orthonormal 8-point DCT coefficient ROM. In DCT mode it emits C[k][n]; in IDCT mode it emits the transposed coefficient C[k][n] as C[input_frequency][output_sample].
sub_modules.dct8_product: Combinational signed fixed-point multiplier for one sample and one cosine coefficient.
sub_modules.dct8_sum8: Combinational sign-extending eight-input adder tree for accumulating the matrix-vector dot product.
sub_modules.dct8_quantize_saturate: Combinational fixed-point rounding, right-shift scaling by the coefficient fractional width, and signed saturation to OUT_W.
